is_dr3_photometric_system: yes - the EDR3 passbands are the photometric system carried into Gaia DR3 (not DR2)
columns: lambda_nm, GPb, e_GPb, BPPb, e_BPPb, RPPb, e_RPPb (99.99 = undefined)
CAVEAT: This file provides THREE broadband integrated response curves (G, BP, RP). It does NOT provide per-band responses for the 16 GASP asteroid-reflectance sample wavelengths (374-1034 nm, Galluccio+2023 DR3 SSO product). It therefore cannot be used to resample a lab spectrum onto the 16-band GASP grid (3 broadband curves -> cannot produce a 16-element vector). See analysis/c2_composition/diag/PASSBAND_FINDING.md.
status: acquired and verified; NOT wired into resampling pending Werner decision (see finding)
